prompt: Photorealistic overhead photography of an A4 letterhead lying on a dark walnut desk surface. The letterhead is printed on premium cream textured paper stock. At the top-left corner sits the bold LK lettermark formed from structural steel I-beam cross-section shapes, where the vertical stroke of the L becomes the vertical of the K creating a connected ligature resembling a structural joint, with a thin horizontal gold datum line through the junction, no enclosing shape, printed in gold #C9A96E. A gold horizontal line extends from the mark across the full width of the page as a header divider. Below is a clean body text area with placeholder text in dark grey. Architectural props surround the letterhead: a metal ruler, mechanical pencil, and rolled drawings. Shot from directly overhead on 50mm lens, soft natural window light, cinematic warm colour grading, premium stationery photography, Adelaide construction design company branding.
negative_prompt: cheap, cartoon, blurry, distorted text, misspelled, bright, cluttered, white paper, glossy, low quality, amateur, watermark, messy desk
